name.description: The name of your AgentCore Gateway project
name.x-prompt: What would you like to call your AgentCore Gateway?

directory.description: Parent directory where the gateway project is placed.

subDirectory.description: The sub directory the project is placed in. By default this is the project name.

protocol.description: The inbound protocol exposed by your gateway. Only mcp is supported today; additional protocols may be added in future.

auth.description: The method used to authenticate inbound requests to your gateway. Only iam is supported today; cognito and custom-jwt may be added in future.

cedarPolicy.description: Whether to include a Cedar policy engine enforcing fine-grained authorization on the gateway.

infra.description: The type of infrastructure to host your gateway. Select none for no hosting.
infra.x-prompt: How would you like to host your gateway?

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)
